title: malacothrix saxatilis var. commutata
intro: Malacothrix saxatilis var. commutata, also known as California bush sunflower or creosote bush dandelion, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as a natural diuretic, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and other conditions. The herbal preparations of Malacothrix saxatilis var. commutata include infusions and tinctures made from its leaves and flowers, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb.
